description:
## Context

We have 11 real web component libraries at `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-libraries/` plus the helix production library at `/Volumes/Development/booked/helix/packages/hx-library/`. After adding 3 new dimensions (14 total), we need to validate the full scorer at scale and generate actionable reports.

## Implementation

### Benchmark Test Suite
Create `tests/benchmark/cross-library-scorer.test.ts`:

1. **Load all 11 libraries** from `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-libraries/`:
   - material, spectrum, vaadin, fluentui, carbon, ui5, calcite, porsche, ionic, wired, elix
   - Each has `custom-elements.json` at root
   
2. **Load helix library** from `/Volumes/Development/booked/helix/packages/hx-library/custom-elements.json`

3. **For each library, score ALL components** using `scoreComponentMultiDimensional()`

4. **Generate per-library scorecard**:
   - Average score, grade distribution, dimension averages
   - Top 5 / Bottom 5 components
   - Dimension-level insights (which dimensions drag scores down)
   - Confidence breakdown (verified/heuristic/untested)

5. **Cross-library comparison table**:
   - Libraries ranked by average score
   - Per-dimension rankings
   - Identify which dimensions differentiate high vs low scoring libraries

6. **Helix-specific report**:
   - Full component-by-component breakdown
   - Issues found per component (especially from CEM-Source Fidelity)
   - Comparison against Material Web and Carbon (gold standards)
   - Actionable list of issues for the helix team to fix

### Test Assertions
- All libraries parse without errors
- All components score between 0-100
- Grade distribution makes sense (no library is all F, no library is all A)
- CEM-Source Fidelity catches at least 1 real discrepancy in helix (the carousel bug proves they exist)
- Helix scores competitively with Material Web on CEM-native dimensions

### Output
- Test results to stdout (vitest)
- Optional: Write scorecard JSON to `tests/__fixtures__/benchmark-results/` for comparison over time
- Helix report as structured JSON for feeding back to helix team

### Dependencies
- Depends on all 3 new analyzers (F1, F2, F3) being merged

### Key Files
- New: `tests/benchmark/cross-library-scorer.test.ts`
- New: `tests/benchmark/helix-report.test.ts` (helix-specific deep analysis)
- Libraries: `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-libraries/{name}/custom-elements.json`
- Helix: `/Volumes/Development/booked/helix/packages/hx-library/custom-elements.json`

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 11 wc-libraries + helix scored successfully
- [ ] Per-library scorecards generated
- [ ] Cross-library comparison table correct
- [ ] Helix report identifies real issues
- [ ] CEM-Source Fidelity dimension finds real discrepancies
- [ ] No test regressions
- [ ] Benchmark completes in under 60 seconds (performance gate)
title: feat: Cross-Library Benchmark Suite — validate scorer against 11 real libraries + generate Helix report
